top3.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) AS total_cost
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name;

final.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) AS total_cost
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name;
